title: VPN Support Call
text:
## VPN Support Call

**Agent:** Thank you for calling {adjective} IT support. May I have your employee {number}?

**User:** I cannot {verb} from home. The {adjective} icon just spins.

**Agent:** Please {verb} your router, then {verb} the VPN client.

**User:** It asked for my {object} and then said access was {adjective}.

**Agent:** I reset your {object} in Active Directory. Try {verb} again in {number} minutes.

**User:** It works! You are a {adjective} legend.
